title: psychotria nivea
intro: Psychotria nivea, also known as White Ghost or White Spirit, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Psychotria nivea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating skin conditions and infections. Herbal preparations of Psychotria nivea can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
